name: Spaghetti with Shrimp and Eggplant
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and devein the shrimp, then set aside.
2. Trim the ends of the eggplant and peel it. Cut into 1/2 inch cubes.
3. Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a saucepan over medium heat. Add the garlic and cook, stirring, until fragrant but not browned. Stir in tomatoes, honey, pepper flakes, chopped fresh basil (or flat-leaf Italian parsley), salt, and pepper. Simmer, stirring frequently, for about 15 minutes.
4. Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large nonstick skillet over high heat. When very hot, add the eggplant cubes and season with salt and pepper. Cook, tossing occasionally, until nicely browned on all sides. Remove from the skillet and set aside.
5. Add remaining tablespoon of oil to the skillet. Season the shrimp with salt and pepper. Cook over high heat for 1 minute, stirring constantly. Add shrimp to the sauce and stir well. Cook for another minute.
6. Bring a large pot of salted water to boil. Cook spaghetti until al dente, then drain and return it to the pot.
7. Add cooked eggplant mixture to the pasta and toss gently. Return the shrimp to the skillet, combine with the pasta, and mix in grated parmesan cheese. Serve immediately.
Serves 4.
